text:
【文本内容区域1】
allocation consistently offers a reliable and often superior performance. Can one
predict when clever methods will yield more bang for the buck? Yes, in Section
we explore the question of when and why these methods provide the most benefit
to gain insights to apply them effectively.
Contributions and outline.A summary of our contributions is as follows:
-In Section 1 we prescribe a statistical framework for model evaluation con-
sisting of stratification, sampling, and estimation components.(Algorithm
-In SectionB we discuss the design of stratification, sampling, and estima-
tor.In particular,we show that maximizing the efficiency of the Horvitz-
Thompson estimator under proportional allocation is equivalent to optimiz-
ing a k-means criterion (Proposition 2and Corollary )
-InSection 1we explore thebehavior of different options using a wide range
ofexperiments on CVdatasets.Wefind that carefully designed stratification
strategies as well as model-assisted estimators always yield more precise
estimates of model performance compared to naive estimationunder simple
random sampling (Figure 2). Calibration and accurate prediction of the loss
are key to obtaining highly efficient estimators (Figure 3)
Related work and proofs are deferred to the Appendix.

ai_result.summary: 本文提出一种基于分层、采样与估计的统计框架，用于模型性能评估。研究表明，优化Horvitz-Thompson估计器效率等价于k-means聚类优化，且精心设计的分层策略和模型辅助估计器能显著提升估计精度。

entities.description: 用于调查抽样中的无偏估计方法，在文中用于模型性能评估

entities.description: 按比例分配样本的抽样策略，提升估计效率

entities.name: model-assisted estimators
entities.description: 利用辅助模型信息提升估计效率的统计方法

entities.name: k-means criterion
entities.description: 聚类优化目标，文中证明其与估计器效率最大化等价

entities.description: 展示不同方法在估计精度上的对比图

entities.description: 展示校准与损失预测对估计效率影响的图表

modules.text: Proportional allocation consistently offers a reliable and often superior performance. Can one predict when clever methods will yield more bang for the buck? Yes, in Section we explore the question of when and why these methods provide the most benefit to gain insights to apply them effectively.

Contributions and Outline. A summary of our contributions is as follows:
- In Section 1, we prescribe a statistical framework for model evaluation consisting of stratification, sampling, and estimation components. (Algorithm)
- In Section B, we discuss the design of stratification, sampling, and estimator. In particular, we show that maximizing the efficiency of the Horvitz-Thompson estimator under proportional allocation is equivalent to optimizing a k-means criterion (Proposition 2 and Corollary).
- In Section 1, we explore the behavior of different options using a wide range of experiments on CV datasets. We find that carefully designed stratification strategies as well as model-assisted estimators always yield more precise estimates of model performance compared to naive estimation under simple random sampling (Figure 2). Calibration and accurate prediction of the loss are key to obtaining highly efficient estimators (Figure 3).
Related work and proofs are deferred to the Appendix.

visual_notes: 提到了Figure 2和Figure 3，推测图片中包含比较估计精度和校准效果的图表。
未提供实际图像，无法确认图表类型或视觉布局。
